mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, password, nickname, birth_date, member_status, member_role, created_at, updated_at FROM member WHERE email = #{email} AND member_status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM member WHERE email = #{email} AND member_status != 'WITHDRAWN'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, password, nickname, birth_date, member_status, member_role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{birthDate}, #{memberStatus}, #{memberRole}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nickname = #{nickname}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE member SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{id}
UPDATE member SET member_status = 'WITHDRAWN', updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{id}
